posts.title: How I think ChatGPT & Claude might be derailing the next batch of academics
posts.description: Watching classmates breeze through assignments with ChatGPT while learning nothing is honestly kind of depressing. There's a difference between using AI as a tutor versus letting it do all your thinking for you.

posts.title: Insights as a 22yo Software Engineer
posts.description: A young developer's honest take on navigating the tech world, from overcoming imposter syndrome to building real products at a startup.

posts.title: Asking the right questions — an underrated soft skill
posts.description: Turns out for getting better answers it's not about being smarter, it's about asking the right questions in the first place. A quick reflection on how this underrated skill can save you tons of time and frustration, whether you're debugging code or just trying to get stuff done.

posts.title: Develop a Custom useTimer Hook in React
posts.description: I built a clean useTimer hook that handles countdown timers properly with start/stop controls and automatic cleanup.

posts.title: Why is reading the documentation so important?
posts.description: This post explores why RTFM (Reading the F*cking Manual) might be the best advice you'll get as a developer.
